rule_metadata.author: elhoim
rule_metadata.title: Suspicious Files in Default GPO Folder

rules.rule_text:
title: Suspicious Files in Default GPO Folder
id: 5f87308a-0a5b-4623-ae15-d8fa1809bc60
status: test
description: Detects the creation of copy of suspicious files (EXE/DLL) to the default
  GPO storage folder
references:
- https://redcanary.com/blog/intelligence-insights-november-2021/
author: elhoim
date: 2022-04-28
tags:
- attack.t1036.005
- attack.defense-evasion
logsource:
  product: windows
  category: file_event
detection:
  selection:
    TargetFilename|contains: \Policies\{31B2F340-016D-11D2-945F-00C04FB984F9}\
    TargetFilename|endswith:
    - .dll
    - .exe
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: medium
